seo.title: Orbizy - Complete Business Management for Small Businesses | Management App
seo.description: Transform your business with Orbizy! Complete management: financial control, customers, inventory, scheduling, document issuance. Try it free for 30 days!
seo.keywords: business management, small business, financial control, customer management, invoice issuance, quotes, management app, small business ERP, management system, inventory control, online agenda, digital receipts

hero.subtitle: More than 5,000 entrepreneurs have already transformed their businesses with Orbizy. Discover the simplicity of a modern app, designed to make your business management intuitive and efficient.
hero.value_prop: Discover the simplicity of a modern app, designed to make your business management intuitive and efficient.

segments.title: Perfect for your type of business
segments.description: Orbizy serves various segments with personalized solutions for each need

features.title: Everything your business needs in one place
features.description: Complete business management tools, specially developed for entrepreneurs who want to grow organized.

items.title: Customer Management
items.description: Full catalog with order history and personalized relationship
items.details: Keep all your customer data organized, with full purchase history and preferences.

items.title: Financial Control
items.description: Monitor revenue, expenses and cash flow with detailed reports
items.details: Intuitive dashboards with real-time graphs to track your business's financial health.

items.title: Professional Documents
items.description: Issue budgets, contracts, invoices and receipts with professional layout
items.details: Customizable templates with your brand, automatically sent by email or WhatsApp.

items.title: Smart Scheduling
items.description: Organize appointments and services with integrated agenda
items.details: Online scheduling system with automatic confirmations and SMS reminders.

items.title: Inventory Control
items.description: Manage products and services with automatic alerts
items.details: Complete input and output control, with low stock alerts and turnover reports.

items.title: Installment Management
items.description: Control amounts to receive with automatic notifications
items.details: Track pending payments, send automatic reminders and organize your cash flow.

pricing.title: Choose the ideal plan for your business
pricing.description: Start for free and evolve as you grow

testimonials.title: Real success stories
testimonials.description: See how Orbizy transformed businesses like yours

items.name: Maria Silva
items.content: Orbizy completely transformed my salon. Now I have total control of appointments and revenue increased by 40% in 6 months!

items.name: João Santos
items.content: The financial reports are incredible! I can make decisions based on real data and my clients were impressed with the professional budgets.

items.name: Ana Costa
items.content: Inventory control saved me a lot of money. I no longer have dead stock and automatic alerts are perfect!

items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: You have 30 days to test all Orbizy features without commitment. No credit card is required to start.

items.question: Can I cancel at any time?
items.answer: Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time without fees or penalties. Your data remains safe for 90 days after cancellation.

items.question: Does Orbizy work offline?
items.answer: Yes! You can work offline and data is automatically synchronized when the connection is re-established.

items.question: How is the migration of my data done?
items.answer: Our team offers full support for migration. You can easily import data from spreadsheets or other systems.

items.question: Is there a limit on documents issued?
items.answer: On the free plan there are 10 documents/month. On paid plans there are no limits for issuing budgets, contracts and receipts.

items.question: Can I customize documents with my brand?
items.answer: Yes! You can add your logo, brand colors and personalized information to all documents.

items.title: Protected Data
items.description: 256-bit SSL encryption and automatic cloud backup

hero.title: General Data Protection Law
hero.subtitle: Full transparency on how we collect, use and protect your personal data at Orbizy

commitment.title: Our Commitment to Privacy
commitment.description: Orbizy is fully committed to protecting your personal data and in compliance with global data protection standards (GDPR/LGPD). We implement rigorous technical and organizational measures to ensure security, privacy and transparency in the processing of all personal information.

data_types.title: Data We Collect
data_types.subtitle: We only collect the data necessary to provide our services with excellence

items.title: Usage Data
items.description: Information on how you use the platform

items.title: Contract Execution
items.description: We process your data to fulfill the service contract of the Orbizy platform, including account creation, payment processing and technical support.

items.title: Consent
items.description: For marketing communications, newsletter and optional features, we request your express consent, which can be withdrawn at any time.

items.title: Legitimate Interest
items.description: For platform improvements, fraud prevention and data security, we base processing on our legitimate interest, always respecting your rights.

hero.title: How We Use Cookies
hero.subtitle: Full transparency on how we collect and use cookies to improve your Orbizy experience

what_are.title: What are Cookies?
what_are.description: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences, improve your experience and provide personalized features on the Orbizy platform.

types.title: Types of Cookies We Use
types.subtitle: We classify our cookies into different categories for greater transparency

items.title: Marketing Cookies

important.title: Important to Know
notes: Disabling essential cookies may affect Orbizy platform functionality.
Analytic cookies help us improve our services but are optional.
Your preferences are respected and can be changed at any time.
Updates to this policy will be communicated via the cookie banner.
